title: stelis tunariensis
intro: Stelis tunariensis, also known as the Tunari orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the orchid family. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Stelis tunariensis include relief from fever, sore throat, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce oxidative stress and improve immune function. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various ailments in traditional medicine.
